examples: When his cows calve each year he keeps one or two calves for his family.
The whales migrate some 6,000 miles to breed and calve in the warm lagoons.
The cow is expected to calve next week.
Blades striker Cresswell neatly converted Jean Calve's cross from close range in the 15th minute for his first goal of the campaign.
French defender Calve swept over a cross from the right into the path of Cresswell, who made no mistake from six yards.
